title: Exactly-Once Task Processor (Distributed Systems)
prompt: Implement a distributed task processor in Python using Redis. Multiple workers consume tasks concurrently, tasks may be delivered more than once, and workers may crash mid-execution. Each task must be executed exactly once. Handle duplicate deliveries, worker crashes, and safely retry stuck tasks without duplicating side effects.
rubric: Implements every explicit requirement named in the prompt
Correctly handles the hard cases the prompt calls out (concurrency, crashes, duplicates, ordering, recovery, etc.)
Code is complete and coherent enough to run, not pseudocode or stubs
No correctness bugs in the core algorithm or data structures
